items.title: Plan to consolidate Cambridge housing and homeless services into a unified Housing Department
items.summary: City Manager Yi-An Huang's plan to reorganize and consolidate housing and homeless service programs currently spread across three City departments into a single, unified Housing Department. The Council held a public hearing under Article 5, Section 5-1 of the City Charter and approved the plan 8-0-1 (Councillor Simmons absent), placing the communication on file.
items.body: A communication transmitted from Yi-An Huang, City Manager, relative to a plan to align all housing and homeless services and programs into a unified Housing Department. TABLED IN COUNCIL FEBRUARY 9, 2026.

vote.result: Approved and CMA Placed on File [8-0-1]

history.action: Approved and CMA Placed on File [8-0-1]

rationale.housing.affordability:public_housing: Consolidation includes City housing programs (e.g. CHA-adjacent / public housing administration) into one department
rationale.topic.area:public_health: Consolidates homeless service programs, a public-health-adjacent service area
rationale.demo.income:low: Homeless services and City housing programs serve low-income residents
